mapper.select: SELECT competition_id, title, tag1, tag2, tag3, tag4, tag5, user_id, deadline, max_participants FROM competition WHERE competition_id = #{competitionId}
SELECT cm.user_id, u.user_name FROM competition_member cm JOIN user u ON cm.user_id = u.user_id WHERE cm.competition_id = #{competitionId} AND cm.admission_status = TRUE
SELECT c.user_id, u.user_name FROM competition c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.competition_id = #{competitionId}
SELECT st.tag_name, ust.skill_level, ust.confidence, ust.evidence FROM user_skill_tag ust JOIN skill_tag st ON ust.tag_id = st.tag_id WHERE ust.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ust.confidence DESC

SELECT tag_id, tag_name, tag_aliases, tag_level, tag_category FROM skill_tag WHERE is_active = TRUE AND ( tag_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tagName}, '%') OR tag_aliases LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tagName}, '%') ) LIMIT 5
SELECT weekly_hours, busy_level, available_periods, score_availability FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT competition_name, competition_time, role, award, description FROM user_competition_experience WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY competition_time DESC
SELECT score_competition, score_tech_depth, score_teamwork, score_learning, score_availability, composite_score, ability_summary FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT domain, confidence FROM user_domain WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY confidence DESC
